document_id: 3rd and 4th Quarter 2016 Gas-1201ME Motor Fuels Claim for Refund Special Mobile Equipment

findings.description: Two-column form layout collapsed into a single column.
findings.evidence: In the PDF on page 1, the top section has form fields (Name, Address, etc.) on the left and a secondary column on the right for 'Fill in applicable circles', 'FEIN', and 'Quarter Ending'. The HTML completely flattens this into a single continuous vertical stream of text and lists.
The NCDOR graphical logo at the top left of the PDF is not present in the HTML, which instead just renders the text 'NCDOR'.
